title: Geometric recursion: a calls/level => a^k subproblems
statement_informal: A divide-and-conquer making a recursive calls per level has a^k subproblems at depth k (Karatsuba a=3, Strassen a=7, Toom-3 a=5).
references: Master theorem / divide-and-conquer recurrences; cf. Knuth's analyses & Cormen et al.
